form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr5) over 1720m after being wide early at this track, beaten 22 m by Bettorleftalone (2:02.80) in NR up to 52 on April 9 at $41. form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 6th (Sr2) over 1720m at this track, at the bell was 6th-8.18 beaten 11 m by Palatino (2:04.10) in NR up to 58 on April 2 at $26. The run before 6th (Fr2) over 1720m at this track was 5th-6.36 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Heavenly Reason (2:04.50) in NR up to 57 on March 20 at $11. Among the leading chances from a more favourable draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out during the early and middle stages of the score up.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start 7th (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early speed at Newcastle beaten 7 m by Metallica Man (1:52.90) in NR up to 90 on April 10 at $9. At the previous start 10th (Fr4) over 1609m at Newcastle well beaten by Captain Groove (1:53.50) in NR up to 63 on April 2 at $3.70. A big class drop gives her winning claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke stride as the field negotiated the final turn.
Raced roughly during the score up and broke gait as the start was effected.
Checked between the 600m and 400m behind the weakening Shades Of Heaven.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 7th (Fr6) over 1720m at this track, at the bell was 8th-11.1 beaten 8 m by Lochiel (2:04.00) in NR up to 52 on April 9 at $34. Before that, was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr5) over 1720m at this track beaten 21 m by Lookin Good Margie (2:03.80) in NR up to 53 on March 26 at $9.50. Consider for exotics.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Became unbalanced and galloped passing the 100m.
Had a tendency to hang in whilst under pressure over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Toolijooa Beach at this track over 1720m in a NR up to 58 on March 26 at $41. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing second behind Bettorleftalone at this track over 1720m in a NR up to 52 on April 9 at $23. Place hope.
